---
title: "2025"
description: "The Lodge · 15–20 June 2025"
---

The 2025 meeting was held at **the Lodge**, the workshop's regular home — a week
of talks and long walks. The theme was *Mechanism, Function, and the Explanatory
Reach of Evo-Devo*.

{{< lipsum 2 >}}

## On this page

- [Talks](talks.qmd) — the full programme and abstracts
- [People](people.qmd) — speakers and organisers
- [Photos](photos.qmd) — snapshots from the meeting
